name: vaccine-shipment-tracker
description: Logistics tracking system for vaccine shipments with temperature monitoring

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../contracts && npm install
scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.services:health: curl -f http://localhost:5173 && curl -f http://localhost:9090 && curl -f http://localhost:3001 && curl -f http://localhost:8080/health
scripts.clean: cd contracts && npx hardhat clean && cd ../frontend && rm -rf node_modules && npm install
